item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Saya berpendapat bahwa pendekatan yang menyimpulkan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus selalu diberi prioritas kurang tepat karena dalam praktiknya, hak-hak individu seperti kebebasan berekspresi dan agama tetap dilindungi oleh sistem hukum kita.

notes: Agent A opens by agreeing that social interests should take priority, but by turn 3 rejects always prioritizing society and by turn 5 emphasizes protection of basic rights. Agent B begins with a balance/rights framing and remains mostly consistent, ending with an active defense of individual-rights protections.
